name: Websockets

aliases.name: CommandPort
aliases.comment: Port to send Commands to the Websocket

aliases.name: EventHandlers
aliases.type: { onOpened : Websockets.WebsocketOpened -> msg, onClosed : Websockets.WebsocketClosed -> msg, onError : Websockets.WebsocketError -> msg, onMessage : Websockets.WebsocketMessage -> msg, onDecodeError : String.String -> msg }

aliases.name: EventPort
aliases.comment: Port for subscribing to income events

aliases.name: Methods
aliases.type: { open : String.String -> String.String -> List.List ( String.String, Maybe.Maybe String.String ) -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg, close : String.String -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg, send : String.String -> Json.Encode.Value -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg, onEvent : Websockets.EventHandlers msg -> Platform.Sub.Sub msg }

aliases.name: WebsocketClosed
aliases.comment: Record data when a socket is Closed
aliases.type: { name : Websockets.Event.Name, meta : Websockets.Meta.Meta, reason : String.String }

aliases.name: WebsocketError
aliases.comment: Record data when a socket is Error
aliases.type: { name : Websockets.Event.Name, meta : Websockets.Meta.Meta, error : Maybe.Maybe String.String }

aliases.name: WebsocketMessage
aliases.comment: Record data when a socket is Message
aliases.type: { name : Websockets.Event.Name, meta : Websockets.Meta.Meta, data : String.String }

aliases.name: WebsocketOpened
aliases.comment: Record data when a socket is Opened

values.name: withPorts
values.type: { command : Websockets.CommandPort msg, event : Websockets.EventPort msg } -> Websockets.Methods msg

name: Websockets.Command
comment:
Commands for interacting with Websockets

@docs Command, open, send, close

unions.name: Command
unions.comment: Type for wrapping Commands before JSON encoding

values.name: close
values.comment: JSON Encode a Close command for sending through the Command Port

values.name: open
values.comment: JSON Encode a Open command for sending through the Command Port
values.type: String.String -> String.String -> List.List ( String.String, String.String ) -> Json.Encode.Value

values.name: send
values.comment: JSON Encode a Send command for sending through the Command Port

name: Websockets.Event
comment:
Utilities for handling incoming Websocket events

@docs Event, Name, decodeEvent

unions.name: Event
cases: { name : Websockets.Event.Name, meta : Websockets.Meta.Meta, reason : String.String }
{ name : Websockets.Event.Name, meta : Websockets.Meta.Meta, error : Maybe.Maybe String.String }
{ name : Websockets.Event.Name, meta : Websockets.Meta.Meta, data : String.String }

values.name: decodeEvent
values.comment: Decode a JSON object from the Events port into an `Event`

name: Websockets.Meta
comment:
Storing metadata as Key-Value pairs on a Websocket

@docs Meta, encodeMeta, metaDecoder

aliases.name: Meta
aliases.comment: Metadata is just a `Dict String String`
